mapper.sql: id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM category ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM category WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, sort, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
